definition:
1. to make to live with , (Isocrates Orator); ς. τινὶ τὴν θυγατέρα to give  him one's daughter in marriage , (Herdotus Historicus) 
2. to combine in one city, unite under a capital  or metropolis , ξ. πάντας (i.e. ἐς τὰς Ἀθήνας)) (Thucydides):—;Pass., ξυνοικισθείσης πόλεως the city having been regularly formed , opposite to κατὰ κώμας οἰκίζεσθαι, (Thucydides) 
3. to join in peopling  or colonising  a country, (Euripides) 
4. generally to unite, associate , (Plutarch) (ML)
